channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Qatar warns Iran war could halt Gulf energy exports ‘within weeks’
item.description: Global economies will be affected if the war on Iran continues for weeks, according to Qatar's energy minister.

item.title: Elementary school in Tehran hit, Iran’s foreign ministry says
item.description: Footage shared by Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesman purportedly shows destruction in Shahid Hamedani School in Tehran.

item.title: FIFA, AFC urged to protect Iran women footballers after ‘traitors’ threat
item.description: Iran state TV presenter has threatened women's national team for not singing anthem at opening AFC Cup match.

item.title: ‘Kurdish uprising in Iran unlikely without US-Israeli protection’
item.description: Yerevan Saeed says Iranian Kurdish forces would struggle without outside backing if they launched an uprising in Iran.

item.title: Iranian Kurd fighters ready for a ground operation ‘if opportunity arises’
item.description: Iranian Kurd fighters ready for a ground operation ‘if opportunity arises' after Iran attack

item.title: Messi censured for meeting and applauding Trump amid US attacks on Iran
item.description: Inter Miami and Messi were honoured at the White House, where Trump boasted the US military’s might.

item.title: Moscow sees significant rise in demand for Russian oil, gas amid Iran war
item.description: International Energy Agency warns against politically and economically wrong return to reliance on Russian energy.

item.title: ‘We know Shaheds’: Ukraine touts drone expertise in US-Israel war with Iran
item.description: Ukraine, which has years of experience in downing Russia's Iran-made drones, wants to assist the US and Israel.

item.title: Amid Iran war, will Russia exploit Ukraine’s shortage of Patriot missiles?
item.description: Zelenskyy says more US-made Patriot defence systems were used in three days of the Iran war than in Ukraine since 2022.

item.title: What is the PrSM missile that the US used for the first time in Iran?
item.description: US CENTCOM said Precision Strike Missiles were used in Operation Epic Fury.
